message:
The other day, I was digging through my closet and stumbled upon my go-bag. You know, the one I lovingly packed with snacks, water, and all the important documents? I had to chuckle when I realized it could probably get me through a week in the wilderness — or at least a long traffic jam! 😄 

It’s funny how being a little over-prepared can feel like a badge of honor. While my friends might roll their eyes at my stash of flashlights and extra granola bars, I can’t help but feel a sense of calm knowing I’m ready for whatever pops up. 

What’s the most “over-prepared” thing you’ve done? This little refresher helped me keep my bag in check!
